description: A driller observes a sudden increase in flow from the well, indicating a 'kick' (an influx of formation fluid). They must initiate well control procedures immediately.

nodes.task_description: Detect the kick and activate the emergency shutdown (ESD) to stop the rig floor equipment.

expected_outcome.value: The rig is secured, and ESD is activated.

nodes.task_description: Shut in the well by closing the Blowout Preventer (BOP) to contain the pressure.

expected_outcome.value: The BOP is closed, and the well is successfully shut in.

nodes.task_description: Read and record the shut-in drill pipe pressure and shut-in casing pressure to prepare for circulating the kick out of the well.

expected_outcome.value: The critical pressures are recorded to plan the well kill procedure.
